basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Delhi Metro Rail Corporation (DMRC) General Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 30 April 2026 on the official website www.delhimetrorail.com . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DMRC General Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 57 years Age Relaxation for Deputation: Maximum 55 years

qualification.education_qualification: IRSEE Officer, Varied experience in Rolling Stock, 18 years Gazetted/Executive service, Level 14 Pay Matrix (Rs.144200-218200)
qualification.details: IRSEE officers of Indian Railways with varied experience in Rolling Stock department, conversant with computerized environment, free from D&AR/Vigilance, working in Level 14 (Rs.144200-218200) of 7th CPC, minimum 18 years Gazetted/Executive service.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1,20,000-2,80,000 (Direct); Parent pay + deputation allowance (Deputation) Per Month

selection_process: Personal Interview Medical fitness examination (Direct Recruitment)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMRC General Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.delhimetrorail.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MANIT Bhopal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is 25-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at MANIT Bhopal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc in relevant fields or a B.Tech./B.E. with CGPA 7.5/10 and GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 33 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- + HRA, which can increase up to Rs. 42,000/- + HRA per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is through email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for MANIT Bhopal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection process steps?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is MANIT Bhopal located?
faq.answer: MANIT Bhopal is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, with the pincode 462003.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is MECH/2026/APR/00028.
